mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_rectify_ledger WHERE unit_id=#{unitId} AND rectify_status!=2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_rectify_ledger (rectify_id, batch_id, unit_id, issue_description, issue_category, rectify_status, responsible_person, deadline) VALUES (#{rectifyId},#{batchId},#{unitId},#{issue},'审批驳回',0,#{responsible},DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_rectify_ledger WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} AND issue_category='审批驳回'
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_rectify_ledger SET rectify_status=2, rectify_progress='已整改（重新提交后自动标记）' WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} AND issue_category='审批驳回' AND rectify_status=0
